title: Chocolate Brown Tissue Paper Sheets for Wrapping 60 Large Sheets, Acid Free Art Paper, Perfect for Gift Wrap, Storage, Packing, Art & Craft Bulk Pack Archiving Shredding 70 x 50cm Sheet Size
features: BCreativetolearn Tissue Paper - Smooth, vibrant brown tissue paper. Perfect for gift wrapping, presents, art and craft work. Each pack contains 60 large sheets.

60 Chocolate Brown Tissue Paper Sheets - Each sheet of brown tissue paper measures 70cm x 50cm. A perfect size for wrapping a gift or valuables. The tissue sheets are easy to cut for smaller projects or shredded for gift hampers.

Get Inspired - This strong and versatile, luxury tissue paper is 17gsm weight with consistent colour throughout each sheet. Use to make tissue pom poms, tissue flowers, table decor. Also great to use with wet strength tissue paper - layer over to add colour to your work.

Perfect Presentation - Large sheets of tissue paper are great for making amazing gift wrapping. Layer with other tissue paper colours for amazing effects. Use in gift boxes to protect and bring a gift to life. Add brightly coloured ribbons .
Acid Free Tissue Paper - This brown tissue paper is acid free so great for archival work. Great for storing photographs, wrapping clothing and lining storage boxes.
description: Product Description Large Sheets of Brown Tissue Paper Large Vibrant Sheets Each sheet is smooth, consistently coloured and high quality. Sheets are 70 x 50 cm - a great size for wrapping, making crafts and archival work Perfect For Wrapping! Add vibrant gift ribbons to add a certain something to your amazing gift wrapping A bulk pack of brown tissue paper sheets. Each sheet is easy to cut or rip so a little can go a long way.
